title: Auto Swap Offhand
description: Auto Swap Offhand - A Fabric mod for automatic item swapping between hands with customizable pairs and modified items support.
body:
### **Auto Swap Offhand**

Automated item swapping between main hand and offhand with hotkey support!

🎯 **Features**

Quick Swapping - Instant item exchange between hands


Customizable Pairs - Create any item combinations for swapping


Smart Recognition - Distinguishes items with different names and properties


Simple Interface - Built-in GUI for configuring swap pairs


Modified Items Support - Works with totems, enchanted items, and custom items


🎮 **How to Use**

Hotkeys:

K - Open configuration menu


L - Perform quick swap
Setting Up Swap Pairs:

Press K to open the menu


Select two items from the available list


Click "Add Swap Pair" to create a pair


Now use L for instant swapping!


🔧 **Technical Features**


Modification Awareness - Handles enchantments, custom names, damage levels


Safe Swapping - No item loss during exchange


Auto-Detection - Scans inventory for available items


📦 **Installation**

Install Fabric Loader
Place the mod in your mods folder
Launch the game and configure hotkeys!

📄 **License**

MIT License
